ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "pop_density" TEXT /* Population density classification (High, Medium, Low) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_channels" (
  "marketing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "google_adwords" REAL /* Google AdWords expenses */,
  "facebook" REAL /* Facebook expenses */,
  "twitter" REAL /* Twitter expenses */,
  "email_marketing" REAL /* Email marketing expenses */,
  "influencer_marketing" REAL /* Influencer marketing expenses */,
  "event_marketing" REAL /* Event marketing expenses */,
  "marketing_total" REAL /* Total marketing expenses */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the marketing record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the marketing record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marketing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_channels_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "revenue_growth" REAL /* Revenue growth rate */,
  "marketing_effectiveness" REAL /* Marketing effectiveness metric */,
  "employee_productivity" REAL /* Employee productivity metric */,
  "customer_acquisition_cost" REAL /* Customer acquisition cost */,
  "customer_lifetime_value" REAL /* Customer lifetime value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry benchmark record */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry for which the benchmark applies */,
  "average_revenue_growth" REAL /* Average revenue growth rate for the industry */,
  "average_marketing_effectiveness" REAL /* Average marketing effectiveness metric for the industry */,
  "average_employee_productivity" REAL /* Average employee productivity metric for the industry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the benchmark record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the benchmark record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_industry_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-industry mapping record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the company belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_industry_mapping_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "predicted_revenue_growth" REAL /* Predicted revenue growth rate */,
  "predicted_marketing_effectiveness" REAL /* Predicted marketing effectiveness metric */,
  "predicted_employee_productivity" REAL /* Predicted employee productivity metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
